component.name: TauriTavern
component.summary: The classic SillyTavern, rewritten in Tauri/Rust.

description.p: TauriTavern ports the SillyTavern experience to a native Tauri and Rust desktop application while preserving compatibility with the upstream frontend and ecosystem.
It provides local data storage, character and chat management, and Chat Completion integrations without requiring a Node.js runtime.
